tracks.name: Infrastructure & GCP Setup
tracks.description: Local environment configuration, GCP resource provisioning (GCS, BigQuery), and Docker/Conda scaffolding.

tracks.name: Data Ingestion & QC
tracks.description: Automated collection of ClinVar, gnomAD, and Arab-specific datasets to GCS. Perform initial QC and data-type validation.

tracks.name: Data Harmonization & Normalization
tracks.description: Implementing pipelines (bcftools, vt) for variant normalization and lifting over all data to GRCh38.

tracks.name: Master Dataset & Analysis Engine
tracks.description: Building the harmonized Master Dataset in BigQuery and implementing the ACMG rule-based engine (PM2, BS1, etc.).

tracks.name: Statistical Evaluation & Results
tracks.description: Performing statistical analysis of classification shifts and generating high-quality research visualizations in Vertex AI.

latest_t002_verification.command: Playwright local UI check on http://127.0.0.1:8082/ (pass: frozen samples shown; only final CSV download remains)

gcloud run deploy supervisor-ui --source ui --region europe-west1 --project genome-services-platform --allow-unauthenticated --quiet (pass: revisions supervisor-ui-00016-d2x and supervisor-ui-00017-c5n; second deploy synced updated overview_state)
curl -si https://supervisor-ui-142306018756.europe-west1.run.app/api/registry/download.csv (pass: 307 redirect to static GCS CSV)
Playwright live UI check on https://supervisor-ui-142306018756.europe-west1.run.app/ (pass: frozen review copy and updated last-successful-step rendered)

last_successful_step: T002 step 5.7 finalized on 2026-03-12: the supervisor UI now serves a frozen review bundle and a GCS-hosted final CSV, while BigQuery remains reserved for the raw source-of-truth tables only.
